title: anthoxanthum hirtum
intro: Anthoxanthum hirtum, also known as sweet vernal grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its yellowish-green flowers and feathery foliage. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues and soothe digestive problems. The medicinal properties of sweet vernal grass are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, calming nervous system, and supporting immune system function. Sweet vernal grass is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or dried herb, and is also used in some herbal blends to promote relaxation, respiratory health, and overall well-being.
